title: Weyerhaeuser Company (WY) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY ) Q3 2022 Results Conference Call October 28, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Andy Taylor - Director of Investor Relations Devin Stockfish - Chief Executive Officer David Wold - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Susan Maklari - Goldman Sachs Anthony Pettinari - Citi George Staphos - Bank of America Mike Roxland - Truist Securities Mark Wilde - Bank of Montreal Mark Weintraub - Seaport Research Partners Paul Quinn - RBC Capital Markets Kurt Yinger - D.A. Davidson Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Weyerhaeuser Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Q3 Earnings & Sales Top, Fall Y/Y, Stock Down
text: Weyerhaeuser's (WY) Q3 results reflect soft demand and lower export activity owing to the work stoppage.

title: Factor Setting the Tone for Weyerhaeuser's (WY) Q3 Earnings
text: September work stoppages, higher raw material costs, and lower lumber and OSB pricing are likely to reflect on Weyerhaeuser's (WY) third-quarter results.

title: Declining Special Dividends Likely Make Weyerhaeuser A Value Trap
text: WY shares have fallen over the past year as housing concerns have mounted, but they are not yet attractive. WY pays a variable dividend on top of its base dividend, and that variable payment is likely to fall over the next year as lumber prices fall.
